description: Registry of all SSE event types emitted by the control testing pipeline. Used by the frontend to resolve display labels, descriptions, phases, and visual styling for each event.

pipeline_start.label: Pipeline Initiated
pipeline_start.description: Control testing pipeline accepted. Incoming trigger validated and execution context initialised.

preprocessing_start.label: Enriching Context
preprocessing_start.description: Resolving the detailed test specification from the control registry. Binding the full validation description to the execution payload.

preprocessing_complete.label: Context Ready
preprocessing_complete.description: Validation description successfully loaded and injected into the pipeline state. The enriched payload is ready for the analysis graph.

graph_start.label: Analysis Graph Launched
graph_start.description: G01 LangGraph activated. The Interpreter and Evidence Gatherer nodes are running in parallel to classify the test type and locate supporting evidence.

node_start.label: Node Running
node_start.description: A LangGraph analysis node has started execution. Each node runs concurrently as part of the parallel fan-out from the START boundary.

node_labels.interpreter: Classifying the test requirement against the methodology corpus via LLM inference.
node_labels.evidence_gatherer: Scanning the test description for referenced evidence filenames and validating their presence on disk.

node_complete.label: Node Complete
node_complete.description: A LangGraph node has finished execution and its output has been committed to the graph state.

node_labels.interpreter: Test category resolved. Target compliance parameters extracted from the description.
node_labels.evidence_gatherer: Evidence file scan complete. Available files queued for agent analysis.

methodology_resolved.label: Methodology Activated
methodology_resolved.description: The compliance testing methodology playbook for the detected test category has been located and loaded. Tool assignments and procedural instructions are now active.

graph_complete.label: Analysis Graph Done
graph_complete.description: Both parallel LangGraph nodes have completed. The test category, target parameters, and evidence file inventory are finalised and ready for work order compilation.

work_order_compiled.label: Work Order Compiled
work_order_compiled.description: A structured work order has been assembled from the graph outputs. It contains the test category, enriched description, and verified evidence paths ready for agent dispatch.

agent_selected.label: Agent Selected
agent_selected.description: The appropriate specialised compliance agent has been selected based on the test category routed from the analysis graph.

agent_session_created.label: Session Initialised
agent_session_created.description: A secure, isolated agent execution session has been created. The work order is being ingested into the agentic layer for processing.

agent_start.label: Agent Running
agent_start.description: The compliance agent has received the work order and has begun its execution loop. Tool invocations will be streamed as they occur.

tool_call.label: Tool Invoked
tool_call.description: The agent has dispatched a compliance tool to extract or analyse evidence data.

tool_labels.extract_price_change_entries: Scanning Excel workbook for price change condition blocks and commentary annotations.
tool_labels.extract_text_from_image: Extracting structured field text and OCR content from image evidence.
tool_labels.analyse_email_evidence: Analysing email screenshot for stakeholder sign-offs, approval markers, and timeline indicators.
tool_labels.analyse_image_evidence: Inspecting SAP compliance screenshot for interface field values and structural configurations.
tool_labels.get_excel_table_shape: Reading Excel spreadsheet row count, column structure, and boundary row data.
tool_labels.extract_table_structure_from_image: Parsing image table layout to count data rows and capture boundary record content.
tool_labels.parse_excel_raw: Performing high-fidelity raw structural extraction of spreadsheet contents for reconciliation.

tool_result.label: Tool Output Received
tool_result.description: A compliance tool has returned its extraction results. The agent is now analysing the output against the test criteria.

agent_complete.label: Agent Verdict Issued
agent_complete.description: The compliance agent has completed its analysis and issued a final Pass or Fail determination with a supporting audit justification.

pipeline_complete.label: Pipeline Complete
pipeline_complete.description: The full control testing pipeline has finished execution. The compliance verdict and audit justification are available for review.

error.label: Pipeline Error
error.description: An error occurred during pipeline execution. Check the phase and message fields for details.
